sizing_rule.note: Do not apply optimal f until trade dependency is empirically validated in live conditions. Using optimal f derived from dependent trades on independent sequences causes oversizing. Prerequisite: identify, exploit, and confirm dependency persistence before optimal f calculation.

source_rule_text: First stage of money management is to exploit and remove any dependency in trades before applying position sizing, as using optimal f based on dependency assumptions will result in oversizing if that dependency does not persist in live trading.
